title: Reduce header vertical spacing and compact layout

requirements.summary: Reduce vertical padding and spacing around all header elements to create a more compact top section
acceptanceCriteria: The overall height of the header section is visibly reduced
Padding around header elements is decreased while maintaining visual balance
All header elements remain properly aligned and readable

file_operations.description: Reduce vertical padding on the main header container. Decrease padding classes such as py-* on the header wrapper and internal flex containers. Adjust spacing between header rows to create a more compact appearance while maintaining proper alignment of the logo, navigation dropdown, search bar, and authentication controls.

requirements.summary: Decrease vertical spacing between logo, BrandingBannerDropdown menu, and login button stacked in top left area
acceptanceCriteria: The gap between the logo and dropdown menu is reduced
The gap between the dropdown menu and login button is reduced
Elements remain easily clickable with sufficient touch targets

file_operations.description: Reduce the gap-* or space-y-* classes between the vertically stacked elements in the top left area (logo, BrandingBannerDropdown, and login button). Replace larger gap values with smaller ones (e.g., gap-4 to gap-2) to bring these elements closer together while ensuring touch-friendly click targets remain intact.

Review and reduce any internal padding or margin that contributes to vertical spacing around the branding banner and dropdown trigger area. Adjust padding classes to minimize vertical space consumption.

Review and adjust any internal spacing in the dropdown menu component that affects the vertical layout when rendered. Ensure the dropdown trigger button has minimal vertical padding while maintaining usability.

requirements.summary: Move slogan text closer to header content to reduce overall header height
acceptanceCriteria: The slogan text is positioned closer to the header elements above it
The overall vertical space consumed by the top section is noticeably reduced
The slogan remains readable and properly styled

file_operations.description: Locate the slogan text element within the Header component and reduce the margin-top, padding-top, or gap value that separates it from the header elements above. Replace larger spacing utility classes with smaller values (e.g., mt-6 to mt-2) to pull the slogan closer to the header content and reduce the overall vertical footprint of the top section.
